programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Deal with the consequences when a first-time buyer skips her home inspection.

programme.desc: Sniff out what’s causing cracks to form in a recently installed tile floor.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Get inspired by a generous tile supplier who brings Mike in to fix a shoddy job.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Listen in and learn Mike’s fix for noisy neighbours in a semi-detached home.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Examine a new home full of foul conditions that an inspection failed to reveal.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Assess the risks of trusting an inspection to reveal major underlying issues.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Flip for a home with upstairs living areas that capture the beautiful view.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Face deadlines and surprise costs as a duo turns a shaky barn into a luxe home.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Grapple with a couple’s no-plans approach to DIY in their movable off-grid home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Look on as the pros give a much-needed lift to a structurally unsafe home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Dig up fixes to home-inspection misses that buoy a dog-loving couple’s spirits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Buckle up as the team tackles a chaotic house bought without a home inspection.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Say goodbye to leaky windows and a freezing family room in a sweet new home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Deal with the consequences when a first-time buyer skips her home inspection.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Finish strong on the Country House and see if Mike and MJ turn a profit.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Watch Mike’s ambitious two-storey reno plan sideline MJ’s more modest proposal.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Uncover cracks in MJ’s hot tub dreams as heavy rain dampens timbers and spirits.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Check in with MJ, who has to take the helm when Mike and the crew fall ill.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Descend into endless debates as Mike’s job-site takeover ratchets up tension.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Feel the tension as two pro building teams vie to build the ultimate BBQ deck.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Witness a testosterone-fuelled clash as pro teams build the ultimate dude deck.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Check out the results of a new challenge: constructing a luxe feminine getaway.

programme.title: Deck Wars
programme.desc: Relax as two teams of DIY weekend warriors design and build chill hot tub decks.

programme.desc: Explore a custom-built healing oasis, where a boxing legend KOs the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Deal with red tape when Mike fixes up a dangerous DIY job in a century home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Reckon with mould, dry rot, and ants when Mike rebuilds a home swamped by rain.

programme.desc: Hail Mike’s pro pals, who pitch in to finish the job at the rain-swamped home.
